item.description: Hi👋 I am Ana Ezquerro. I’m an NLP researcher at the LyS Group (University of A Coruña). I previously obtained a bachelor degree in Data Science and Engineering (July 2023), and, recently, a master degree in Artificial Intelligence (February 2025). My initial research covers time series analysis and machine learning algorithms applied to statistics. Right now I am working on graph/tree (incremental) parsing and multimodal learning. I am also planning a PhD degree on efficient and human-like incremental language representations.
